title: nepeta subhastata
intro: Nepeta subhastata, also known as Subhastata Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a herbaceous perennial native to the mountainous regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Nepeta subhastata is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
